description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Ubuntu CI that runs on every push to main and tags, and on pull requests. Use a matrix job with multiple ubuntu versions and LLVM versions, running in a container with the corresponding ubuntu image. The job should install software, add a git ppa, install git, checkout sources, detect package metadata, run a CI task with ansible-playbook, and publish or move a package depending on the presence of a Cloudsmith API key.
